display.name: Uptime
display.description: Pod uptime

display.name: Batch Size Average
display.description: Average size of the batches processed by the connector

display.name: Running ratio
display.description: The fraction of time this task has spent in the running state.

display.name: Offset commit Average Time
display.description: The average time in milliseconds taken by this task to commit offsets

display.name: Batch Size Avg
display.description: Average size of the batches processed by the connector

display.name: JVM Threads used
display.description: JVM threads info

display.name: JVM memory used [non-heap]
display.description: used non-heap memory in Mi

display.name: JVM memory used [heap]
display.description: used heap memory in Mi

display.name: JVM pool bytes used
display.description: JVM pool usage info

display.name: Connector count
display.description: Total connector in this cluster

display.name: GC count increase
display.description: GC count increase

display.name: GC time increase
display.description: GC time increase

display.name: Poll Batch Average time
display.description: The average time in milliseconds taken by this task to poll for a batch of source records

display.name: Source Record Poll Total
display.description: The total records produced/polled (before transformation) by this task belonging to the named source connector in this worker.

display.name: Source Record Write Total
display.description: Total records output from the transformations and written to Kafka for this task belonging to the named source connector in this worker. This is after transformations are applied and excludes any records filtered out by the transformations.

display.name: Source Record Active Count average
display.description: The average number of records that have been produced by this task but not yet completely written to Kafka.

display.name: Poll Batch Max time
display.description: The maximum time in milliseconds taken by this task to poll for a batch of source records

display.name: Source Record Active Count max
display.description: The maximum number of records that have been produced by this task but not yet completely written to Kafka.

display.name: Put Batch Average time
display.description: The average time in milliseconds taken by this task to put a batch of sinks records

display.name: Put Batch Max time
display.description: The maximum time in milliseconds taken by this task to put a batch of sinks records

display.name: Task count
display.description: Total tasks in pods

display.name: Partition Count
display.description: The number of topic partitions assigned to this task belonging to the named sink connector in this worker.

display.name: Record Send Total
display.description: The total record send from kafka

display.name: Record Read Total
display.description: The total record read from kafka

display.name: Total record failures
display.description: Total number of failures seen by task

display.name: Dead letter queue Produce requests
display.description: Number of produce requests to the dead letter queue

display.name: Dead letter queue Produce failures
display.description: Number of produce failures to the dead letter queue

display.name: Total record skipped
display.description: Total number of records skipped by task

display.name: Total record errors
display.description: Total number of errors seen by task

display.name: Total errors logged
display.description: The number of messages that was logged into either the dead letter queue or with Log4j

display.name: Total retries
display.description: Total number of retries made by task

display.name: Network-I/O-rate
display.description: The average number of network operations (reads or writes) on all connections per second.
